description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof design with multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a clean and contemporary appearance. The structure includes a main residential block, a separate garage, and a greenhouse with transparent panels, all surrounded by landscaped greenery and palm trees. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, accented with wooden panels and stone planters. A paved driveway and entry path lead to the main entrance, while a central courtyard and a small pool or sand area provide outdoor leisure space. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, maximizing natural light and views of the garden. The property is enclosed by low stone walls and features a mix of hardscape and softscape elements for a balanced urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a greenhouse, garage, landscaped gardens, and a mix of glass, stone, and wood accents. The design features clean lines, large windows, and a central courtyard.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above the main courtyard, highlighting the greenhouse, palm trees, and the L-shaped layout with stone planters and paved paths.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the main entrance, garage, and a clear view of the greenhouse and driveway.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear side, emphasizing the pool or sand area, the flat roof sections, and the detached structure at the edge.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the side elevation with the greenhouse, palm trees, and the open courtyard area, as well as the relationship between the main building and outbuildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
